settings.title: Settings

system.reCalibrateConfirm: Run full vehicle power-on calibration again? This resets the first-run tour and returns to Home.

settings.signInFail: Sign-in failed. Allow pop-ups and check your network, then retry.
settings.restorePurchasesEmpty: No Pro entitlement found on this device.
settings.deleteHint: Deletes cloud-linked identity permanently. Cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete account now? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteRequiresRecentLogin: Sign in again before deleting your account.
settings.deleteReauthFail: Re-authentication failed. Allow the Google prompt and retry.
settings.deleteCloudPartial: Account deleted; cloud cleanup continues in background.
settings.deleteAuthFail: Unable to delete account. Try again later.
settings.deleteNotAllowed: Only signed-in Google accounts can delete.
